title: Remove chore commit logic from _protect_worktree_bead_state
description: In src/agent_takt/gitutils.py around lines 162-197, strip the git rm --cached -r --ignore-unmatch .takt/beads/ call and the subsequent git commit chore call from _protect_worktree_bead_state. The function body should reduce to calling _write_worktree_exclude(self.root, worktree_path) and returning. Bead state files inherited from main remain tracked in the feature branch index; they are no longer untracked via a destructive commit. Remove any conditional logic around checking whether bead state files are tracked.
acceptance_criteria: _protect_worktree_bead_state contains no call to git rm --cached or git commit
grep -n 'untrack bead state' src/agent_takt/gitutils.py returns no results
grep -n 'git rm --cached' src/agent_takt/gitutils.py returns no results for lines inside _protect_worktree_bead_state
